da.hero_title: Din rejse mod at blive yogalærer
da.hero_subtitle: Drømmer du om at blive yogalærer – eller fordybe dig i yogaens verden? Vores 200-timers uddannelse er en komplet, klassisk grunduddannelse, der giver dig et solidt fundament i både teori og praksis.
da.hero_subtext: Designet til alle niveauer – det perfekte udgangspunkt for dig, der vil undervise professionelt eller styrke din egen praksis i dybden.
da.hero_acc1_body: Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin og Hot Yoga. Vi går i dybden med teknik, justeringer og forståelsen af hver stil, så du kan undervise sikkert og tydeligt.
da.hero_acc2_body: Funktionel viden om knogler, led, muskler og nervesystem – forklaret enkelt og praktisk, så du trygt kan støtte forskellige kroppe.
da.hero_acc3_body: Oprindelse, formål og udvikling – og hvordan klassiske principper oversættes meningsfuldt til det moderne menneske.
da.hero_acc4_body: Skab en tryg, inspirerende atmosfære, håndtér forskellige elevtyper og opbyg selvtillid som underviser.
da.hero_acc5_body: Planlæg, strukturer og guid klasser med tydelighed, nærvær og autenticitet – fra intro til afslapning.
da.hero_acc6_body: Sammensæt sikre, flydende og meningsfulde sekvenser med temaer, progression og musikvalg.
da.hero_acc7_body: Unikt hos Yoga Bible: konkrete erfaringer om karriereveje – fra at starte som underviser til at åbne eget studie eller planlægge retreats.
da.hours_lead: Bliv certificeret til at undervise Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin, Hot Yoga & Meditation. Nedenfor ser du et enkelt overblik over timefordelingen.
da.hours_mod1_desc: Stærke grundfundamenter, aktive stillinger i roligt tempo og tydeligt class management.
da.hours_mod2_desc: Flow og åndedræt koblet med kreativ sekvensering – design sikre, klare forløb.
da.hours_mod3_desc: Rolige, længere hold der arbejder i bindevævet. Meridianforståelse og praktisk sekvensering.
da.hours_mod4_desc: Funktionel anatomi for led, muskler og nervesystem – forklaret enkelt og brugbart.
da.hours_mod5_desc: Historie og nøglebegreber – integreret i moderne praksis og undervisning.
da.hours_mod6_desc: 60 studietimer inkl. adgang til klasser + 20 t. opgaver + 10 t. hjemme-/online praksis.
da.hours_note: Internationalt anerkendt Yoga Alliance 200-hr certificering. Velegnet til alle niveauer.
da.cred_lead: Uddannelsen er Yoga Alliance-certificeret og undervises af erfarne lærere med mange års erfaring i både undervisning, anatomi, filosofi og yogapraksis.
da.cred_body: Vi har mere end 10 års erfaring med at uddanne yogalærere og over 500 studerende har allerede gennemført vores programmer siden 2014 – tidligere kendt som Triangle Yoga Academy.
da.cred_quote: Det er mere end en uddannelse – det er en rejse mod indsigt, dyb forståelse og professionel udvikling.
da.breakdown_lead1: Vores 200-timers yogauddannelse kombinerer teori, praksis og personlig udvikling. Metoden er afprøvet og virker: op til 95% af vores dimittender står trygt foran en klasse ved afslutning.
da.breakdown_lead2: Når du certificeres i Hatha, Vinyasa og Yin – tre af de mest udbredte stilarter i verden – kan du undervise alle niveauer på tværs af stilarter.
da.breakdown_note: Kan du ikke deltage fysisk en dag, kan du deltage online på udvalgte workshops eller se optagelsen efterfølgende.
da.breakdown_a1_body:
I løbet af uddannelsen deltager du i 60 yogaklasser i vores studie i Christianshavn. Du kan frit vælge mellem Hot Yoga, Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin og Bikram Variation samt temaworkshops.

Unik fleksibilitet: Så snart du har betalt depositum, kan du begynde at praktisere disse timer – selv før holdstart.
da.breakdown_a2_body: Du observerer undervisning i andre studier og analyserer udvalgte online-klasser. Det giver indsigt i, hvordan forskellige lærere strukturerer klasser og skaber atmosfære.
da.breakdown_a3_body: Du lærer Vinyasaens filosofi, historie, teknik, sekvensering, alignment og cueing. Fokus er logik, sikkerhed og flow – så du kan lede blandede niveauer med overblik.
da.breakdown_a4_body: Fordybelse i Yin: stillinger, varighed, støtte, bindevæv og nervesystem. Du lærer at undervise Yin trygt og nærværende.
da.breakdown_a5_body: Klassiske Hatha-principper, korrekt teknik og åndedræt. Du bygger styrke, fokus og balance.
da.breakdown_a6_body: Bliv en klar, professionel og inspirerende underviser. Klassepsykologi, stemmetræning, tilstedeværelse og guidning.
da.breakdown_a7_body:
Muskler, led og skelet, samt åndedræts-, nerve-, kredsløbs- og fordøjelsessystemer. Du lærer, hvordan yoga påvirker kroppen og hvordan skader undgås.

Typisk planlagt som 4-timers sessioner.
da.breakdown_a8_body:
Hvad er yoga ud over det fysiske? Historie, traditioner og filosofiske grundlag.

Online i 3-timers moduler. Kan følges live eller ses som optagelse.
da.breakdown_a9_body: Løbende opgaver fra underviserne hjælper dig med at reflektere og anvende stoffet. Du træner praktisk undervisning med ægte elever.
da.online_lead: Vi sikrer, at du kan følge med – også når livet sker.
da.online_text1: Vi tror, at en seriøs yogalæreruddannelse sker fysisk: reel praksis, observation, deltagelse på åbne hold, forskellige lærere – og workshops med spørgsmål og direkte feedback.
da.online_text2: Livet sker: sygdom og aftaler må ikke betyde, at du mister et emne eller sakker bagud.
da.online_detail1: Vi har installeret et professionelt audio- og videosetup i yogasalen. Med få klik får du et live-link i høj kvalitet og lav latenstid – set oppefra med overblik over lærer og hele salen.
da.online_detail2: Kan du ikke deltage live? Vi optager sessionen og sender et optagelseslink bagefter.
da.online_detail3: Er en 5-timers workshop for lang at gense? Du får en kort opsummering af hovedpointer og øvelser.
da.online_result: Resultat: Du kommer aldrig bagud – uanset hvad der sker.
da.online_check1: Du modtager et personligt live- eller optagelseslink.
da.online_check2: Log ind fra telefon, tablet eller computer – lav latenstid.
da.online_check3: Kamera fra oven giver overblik over underviser og sal.
da.ya_title: Yoga Alliance USA – Hvorfor det betyder noget
da.ya_lead: En Yoga Alliance-certificeret uddannelse løfter dit bevis – og forpligter os til opdaterede standarder, gennemsigtighed og kvalitet.
da.ya_faq1_a: RYS = Registered Yoga School (fx RYS 200). RYT = Registered Yoga Teacher – dit personlige certifikat hos Yoga Alliance.
da.ya_faq2_a: Ja. RYT er globalt genkendt og gør jobansøgninger lettere. Studier kigger stadig på erfaring og match – men RYT åbner døre.
da.ya_faq3_a: Forløb kører primært på engelsk for international anvendelighed. Vi støtter dig i dansk terminologi, cues og materialer.
da.ya_faq4_a: Tag 200H hos os → vælg en 300H Advanced YTT (vi planlægger hold fra 2026) → registrér som RYT 500.
da.ya_point1: International anerkendelse: RYT gør ansættelser lettere globalt – høj værdi og genkendelse.
da.ya_point2: Kvalitet & tilsyn: Som RYS 200 er vi under professionelt tilsyn og følger standarder.
da.ya_point3: Opdateret pensum: Løbende revision + efteruddannelse (YACEP) holder indholdet skarpt.
da.ya_point4: Sprog: De fleste forløb er på engelsk – vi hjælper, hvis du vil undervise på dansk.
da.ya_point5: Din fremtid: 200H kan blive din vej til at designe egne TT og søge YA-godkendelse.
da.cta_title: Klar til at starte din rejse?
da.cta_text: Få skemaet og ansøg i dag. Næste hold starter snart.

en.hero_title: Your journey to becoming a yoga teacher
en.hero_subtitle: Do you dream of becoming a yoga teacher – or diving deeper into the world of yoga? Our 200-hour training is a complete, classical foundation that gives you a solid base in both theory and practice.
en.hero_subtext: Designed for all levels – the perfect starting point for those who want to teach professionally or deepen their own practice.
en.hero_acc1_body: Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin and Hot Yoga. We go deep into technique, adjustments and understanding of each style, so you can teach safely and clearly.
en.hero_acc2_body: Functional knowledge of bones, joints, muscles and the nervous system – explained simply and practically, so you can confidently support different bodies.
en.hero_acc3_body: Origins, purpose and evolution – and how classical principles translate meaningfully to the modern human.
en.hero_acc4_body: Create a safe, inspiring atmosphere, handle different student types and build confidence as a teacher.
en.hero_acc5_body: Plan, structure and guide classes with clarity, presence and authenticity – from intro to relaxation.
en.hero_acc6_body: Create safe, flowing and meaningful sequences with themes, progression and music selection.
en.hero_acc7_body: Unique to Yoga Bible: practical insights on career paths – from starting as a teacher to opening your own studio or planning retreats.
en.hours_lead: Get certified to teach Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin, Hot Yoga & Meditation. Below you'll find a simple overview of the hour distribution.
en.hours_mod1_desc: Strong foundations, active postures at a calm pace and clear class management.
en.hours_mod2_desc: Flow and breath coupled with creative sequencing – design safe, clear progressions.
en.hours_mod3_desc: Calm, longer holds working in connective tissue. Meridian understanding and practical sequencing.
en.hours_mod4_desc: Functional anatomy for joints, muscles and the nervous system – explained simply and practically.
en.hours_mod5_desc: History and key concepts – integrated into modern practice and teaching.
en.hours_mod6_desc: 60 study hours incl. class access + 20 hrs assignments + 10 hrs home/online practice.
en.hours_note: Internationally recognized Yoga Alliance 200-hr certification. Suitable for all levels.
en.cred_lead: The training is Yoga Alliance certified and taught by experienced teachers with many years of experience in teaching, anatomy, philosophy and yoga practice.
en.cred_body: We have more than 10 years of experience training yoga teachers and over 500 students have already completed our programs since 2014 – previously known as Triangle Yoga Academy.
en.cred_quote: It is more than an education – it is a journey toward insight, deep understanding and professional development.
en.breakdown_lead1: Our 200-hour yoga teacher training combines theory, practice and personal development. The method is tried and tested: up to 95% of our graduates stand confidently in front of a class at completion.
en.breakdown_lead2: When you certify in Hatha, Vinyasa and Yin – three of the most widespread styles in the world – you can teach all levels across styles.
en.breakdown_note: Can't attend in person? You can participate online for selected workshops or watch the recording afterwards.
en.breakdown_a1_body:
During the training you participate in 60 yoga classes at our studio in Christianshavn. You can freely choose between Hot Yoga, Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin and Bikram Variation plus themed workshops.

Unique flexibility: As soon as you've paid the deposit, you can start practicing these hours – even before the course starts.
en.breakdown_a2_body: You observe teaching at other studios and analyze selected online classes. This provides insight into how different teachers structure classes and create atmosphere.
en.breakdown_a3_body: You learn Vinyasa philosophy, history, technique, sequencing, alignment and cueing. The focus is logic, safety and flow – so you can lead mixed levels with confidence.
en.breakdown_a4_body: Deep dive into Yin: poses, duration, support, connective tissue and the nervous system. You learn to teach Yin safely and with presence.
en.breakdown_a5_body: Classical Hatha principles, correct technique and breathwork. You build strength, focus and balance.
en.breakdown_a6_body: Become a clear, professional and inspiring teacher. Class psychology, voice training, presence and guidance.
en.breakdown_a7_body:
Muscles, joints and skeleton, plus respiratory, nervous, circulatory and digestive systems. You learn how yoga affects the body and how injuries are prevented.

Typically scheduled as 4-hour sessions.
en.breakdown_a8_body:
What is yoga beyond the physical? History, traditions and philosophical foundations.

Online in 3-hour modules. Join live or watch the recording.
en.breakdown_a9_body: Ongoing assignments from the teachers help you reflect on and apply the material. You practice teaching with real students.
en.online_lead: We make sure you can keep up – even when life happens.
en.online_text1: We believe a serious yoga teacher training happens in person: real practice, observation, participation in open classes, different teachers – and workshops with questions and direct feedback.
en.online_text2: Life happens: illness and appointments shouldn't mean you miss a topic or fall behind.
en.online_detail1: We have installed a professional audio and video setup in the yoga hall. With a few clicks you get a high-quality live link with low latency – viewed from above with an overview of the teacher and the entire room.
en.online_detail2: Can't join live? We record the session and send you a recording link afterwards.
en.online_detail3: Is a 5-hour workshop too long to rewatch? You get a short summary of key points and exercises.
en.online_result: Result: You never fall behind – no matter what happens.
en.online_check1: You receive a personal live or recording link.
en.online_check2: Log in from phone, tablet or computer – low latency.
en.online_check3: Camera from above gives an overview of the teacher and room.
en.ya_title: Yoga Alliance USA – Why It Matters
en.ya_lead: A Yoga Alliance certified training elevates your credentials – and commits us to updated standards, transparency and quality.
en.ya_faq1_a: RYS = Registered Yoga School (e.g. RYS 200). RYT = Registered Yoga Teacher – your personal certificate with Yoga Alliance.
en.ya_faq2_a: Yes. RYT is globally recognized and makes job applications easier. Studios still look at experience and fit – but RYT opens doors.
en.ya_faq3_a: Programs run primarily in English for international applicability. We support you with Danish terminology, cues and materials.
en.ya_faq4_a: Take 200H with us → choose a 300H Advanced YTT (we're planning cohorts from 2026) → register as RYT 500.
en.ya_point1: International recognition: RYT makes hiring easier globally – high value and recognition.
en.ya_point2: Quality & oversight: As RYS 200 we are under professional oversight and follow standards.
en.ya_point3: Updated curriculum: Ongoing revision + continuing education (YACEP) keeps content sharp.
en.ya_point4: Language: Most programs are in English – we help if you want to teach in Danish.
en.ya_point5: Your future: 200H can become your path to designing your own TT and seeking YA approval.
en.cta_text: Get the schedule and apply today. Next cohort starts soon.
